summary.text: [0-8] A blonde woman wearing a light blue jacket and pearl necklace sits in a maroon armchair, speaking and tilting her head slightly against a background featuring a wooden grid pattern and a plant on the left. [8-14] The video cuts to a man in a grey suit holding a dark food strip close to the camera. Behind him to the left, a bald man with glasses wears a black t-shirt with "SOPPA SMOKERS" text and blue gloves. To the right, a person in a white coat is partially visible. The man in the suit bites the food, chews, and continues speaking while holding the item.

[16-20] A yellow graphic overlay appears at the bottom with the text "Fire Up the Grill this Summer" and a website URL. The man in the grey suit turns to face a man in a white chef's coat on the right, gesturing with a dark food strip while speaking to him. [20-22] The bald man in a black t-shirt with white text appears on the left as the man in the white coat exits; the man in the grey suit gestures with the food towards the bald man, who smiles broadly. [22-24] The bald man stands centrally wearing blue gloves and moving his arms, while the man in the grey suit is largely out of frame with only a hand visible. [24-28] The man in the grey suit stands on the right holding the dark food strip and speaking, while the bald man stands to the left smiling, and a person in a white coat is partially visible on the extreme right edge.

[28-34] A man in a grey suit stands center, holding a dark food strip and white papers while speaking and gesturing. To his left, a bald man in a black t-shirt observes, and to the right, a man in a white chef's coat becomes clearly visible in profile. [34-40] The man in the grey suit lifts the food strip to his mouth, takes a bite, and chews while facing the chef. The bald man continues watching from the left. Throughout the clip, a yellow lower-third graphic displays "SAN DIEGO LIVING" alongside the text "Fire Up the Grill this Summer" and the URL "www.bjsrestaurants.com".

[40-42] A man in a grey suit chews a dark food strip while a man in a white chef's coat speaks; a bald man in a black t-shirt is partially visible on the far left. The yellow lower-third graphic reads "Fire Up the Grill this Summer" and "www.bjsrestaurants.com". [50-52] The graphic text changes to identify the speaker as "James Drake" and "Head Chef, BJ's Restaurants" while he continues talking.

[80-82] The graphic updates to identify him as 'Sterling Ball', 'CEO, Big Poppa Smokers'. [82-86] The text clears from the bar, leaving only the 'San Diego Living' logo visible on the left. The view then transitions to focus on a white plate holding a burger with a bun, a serving of french fries, and a small bowl of coleslaw. [96-100] The camera focus moves to a rectangular white serving dish filled with golden-brown fried balls located behind the burger plate. A hand in a blue glove is visible near the trays. The yellow graphic overlay remains constant at the bottom of the screen throughout the sequence.

The camera then pans to a large white bowl of green salad with croutons, red onions, and cheese, situated next to pink napkins with a blue logo. Behind him to the left, a bald man with glasses wears a black t-shirt with "SOPPA SMOKERS" text and blue gloves. To the right, a person in a white coat is partially visible. The man in the suit bites the food, chews, and continues speaking while holding the item. [16-20] A yellow graphic overlay appears at the bottom with the text "Fire Up the Grill this Summer" and a website URL. The man in the grey suit turns to face a man in a white chef's coat on the right, gesturing with a dark food strip while speaking to him. [20-22] The bald man in a black t-shirt with white text appears on the left as the man in the white coat exits; the man in the grey suit gestures with the food towards the bald man, who smiles broadly. [22-24] The bald

Inside the trailer, a man in a dark suit laughs and smiles while holding a fork, facing a bald man in a black t-shirt and blue gloves who gestures with his left hand. A static yellow lower-third graphic reads "SAN DIEGO LIVING," "Barbecuing with BJ's," and "www.bjsrestaurants.com." The camera tilts down to show a table surface holding plates of food, including a burger with fries and a large platter of meat. The view zooms in on the platter, revealing barbecue ribs, a wedge of yellow cheese, and bowls of coleslaw, as the man in the suit holds a fork near the food and the bald man stands nearby.

[14-16] A man in a grey suit holds a dark food strip while speaking beside a bald man in a black t-shirt wearing blue gloves, as a gold and white graphic overlay reading 'DAYTONA LIVING' appears. Throughout the sequence, a static yellow lower-third graphic displays "Barbecuing with BJ's" and "www.bjsrestaurants.com".

[184-188] A white platter features dark barbecue ribs, a yellow cheese wedge, two coleslaw bowls, and chicken wings, while a burger plate sits in the background. The camera tilts down and left, showing a silver fork on the grey counter and a partial plate view. [188-192] The shot settles on a new foreground plate holding a large rack of red-sauced ribs, a baked potato, and a small sauce container. The original platter shifts to the upper right. Behind him to the left, a bald man with glasses wears a black t-shirt with "SOPPA SMOKERS" text and blue gloves. To the right, a person in a white coat is partially visible. The man in the suit bites the food, chews, and continues speaking while holding the item. [16-20] A yellow graphic overlay appears at the bottom with the text "Fire Up the Grill this Summer" and a website URL. The man in the grey suit turns to face a man in a white chef's coat on the right, gesturing with a dark food strip while speaking to him. [20-22] The bald man in a black t-shirt with white text appears on the left as the man in the white coat exits; the man in the grey suit gestures with the food towards the bald man, who smiles broadly. [22-24] The bald

[280-284] A person wearing blue gloves shakes seasoning from a container onto two racks of raw ribs and raw chicken breasts lying on a white cutting board. The camera angle widens slightly to reveal knives on a magnetic strip to the right against the white wall. The yellow lower-third graphic remains fixed at the bottom, displaying "Barbecuing with BJ's" and the website "www.bjsrestaurants.com".
[284-288] The lower-third graphic updates to display "Follow BJ's" and "Facebook.com/BJsRestaurants". A man wearing a dark suit and tie appears on the left side of the frame, standing beside the person in the black t-shirt. The individual in the black shirt, which features "Big Poppa Smokers" text in white and red, stands behind the stainless steel counter with the raw ribs and chicken on the white cutting board, wearing blue gloves. The man in the suit, who is bald and wearing glasses, observes the preparation process closely while standing near the counter in the professional kitchen environment with bright lighting.

[288-296] A man wearing a black t-shirt with large white text reading "Big Poppa Smokers" and blue gloves stands behind a counter. To his left, a man in a dark suit and tie is partially visible, holding a small object and looking down at the surface. The camera angle adjusts and zooms in on the man in the black shirt, clearly revealing his bald head and glasses as he looks downward. The man in the suit stands behind him to the left, observing the activity closely. Throughout the entire sequence, a bright yellow lower-third graphic displays "Follow BJ's" and the URL "Facebook.com/BJsRestaurants". The man in the t-shirt appears to be working or handling items at the counter while the suited man watches. The text on the shirt also includes smaller red text below the main logo. The camera initially shifts upward before focusing on the interaction.

[296-300] The camera tilts upward to reveal a bald man wearing glasses, blue gloves, and a black t-shirt with 'Big Poppa Smokers' text standing at a counter. To his left, a man in a dark suit stands observing. A yellow lower-third graphic displays 'Follow BJ's' and a Facebook URL. [300-302] The man in the black t-shirt turns his back to the camera facing right, while the man in the suit holds up a dark rib. [302-304] The camera cuts to a close-up of hands in blue gloves using a knife on a white cutting board beside a sheet of aluminum foil, actively slicing an item. The 'Follow BJ's' graphic remains visible.

[304-308] Hands in blue gloves use a knife to slice cooked meat on a white cutting board next to aluminum foil on a counter. Behind him to the left, a bald man with glasses wears a black t-shirt with "SOPPA SMOKERS" text and blue gloves. To the right, a person in a white coat is partially visible. The man in the suit bites the food, chews, and continues speaking while holding the item. [16-20] A yellow graphic overlay appears at the bottom with the text "Fire Up the Grill this Summer" and a website URL. The man in the grey suit turns to face a man in a white chef's coat on the right, gesturing with a dark food strip while speaking to him. [20-22] The bald man in a black t-shirt with white text appears on the left as the man in the white coat exits; the man in the grey suit gestures with the food towards the bald man, who smiles broadly. [304-308] Hands in blue gloves use a knife to slice cooked meat on a white cutting board next to aluminum foil on a counter. The view shifts to a bald man in a black t-shirt holding meat near his face, while a man in a dark suit stands to the left. [308-312] The man in the dark suit stands in profile facing the bald man, who wears glasses and a black t-shirt with white text reading "Big Poppa Smokers". The bald man smiles and speaks to the suited man. A yellow lower-third graphic remains visible at the bottom displaying "Follow BJ's" and "Facebook.com/BjsRestaurants".

[312-314] A man in a dark suit stands in profile facing a bald man in a black t-shirt who smiles and speaks. [314-316] The camera cuts to a close-up of cooked meat handled by blue-gloved hands. [316-318] The man in the black t-shirt, reading "GEORGIA SMOKERS", gestures with a blue glove near a magnetic knife strip on a white wall. [318-320] The suited man stands in the foreground holding a white object. A yellow lower-third graphic displays "SAN DIEGO LIVING", "Follow BJ's", and "Facebook.com/BJsRestaurants" at the bottom.

[320-328] In the foreground, a man in a dark suit holds a piece of cooked meat on a white napkin, turning slightly and gesturing with his left hand while speaking. Behind him, a bald man in a black t-shirt with white text stands near a counter. A yellow lower-third graphic persists at the bottom, featuring the "SAN DIEGO LIVING" logo and the text "Follow BJ's" alongside "Facebook.com/BJsRestaurants". As the sequence progresses, the camera pulls back slightly, maintaining focus on the man in the suit presenting the food item while the background figure remains stationary near the kitchen equipment.

A man in a dark suit stands in a doorway holding a piece of meat on a white napkin, speaking and gesturing with his free hand, while a bald man wearing a black t-shirt with white text stands near a kitchen counter behind him; a yellow graphic overlay at the bottom displays social media information reading "Follow BJ's Facebook.com/BJsRestaurants". The camera pans to a counter with a black smoker and a tray of ribs while a person in black walks away, revealing a plate with a burger, fries, and wrap in the foreground as the lower-third graphic changes to "Barbecuing with BJ's www.bjsrestaurants.com". The camera zooms in on a white plate featuring dark barbecue ribs, fried items, a wedge of yellow cheese, and small bowls of coleslaw near the smoker, then focuses on a rack of dark, saucy ribs beside a baked potato with a white dollop and a small square dish of red sauce, with the yellow lower-third graphic persisting at the bottom of the screen.
